people.person: An older man with white hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a white shirt
people.action: walking forward, then turning to his left to speak to a group of men

people.person: A group of four younger men in dark clothing
people.action: standing together, listening to the older man

scene.setting: a dimly lit room with a tiled wall, a dark door, and framed pictures on the wall

objects: a red diamond-shaped decoration on the door
a small green box on a counter
interactions: the older man is addressing the group of younger men
key_actions: the older man walking and speaking
the group of younger men standing and listening

visual_expression.person: An older man with white hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a white shirt
facial_cues: his mouth is moving as he speaks
body_cues: he is walking forward and then turns his body and head to address the group
visual_expression.gaze: looking towards the group of younger men

audio_description: A man is speaking in a commanding tone over a background of energetic, rhythmic music.
